criteria.name: Build Clean
criteria.description: npm run build passe sans erreurs TypeScript ni warnings critiques

criteria.name: UI States
criteria.description: Pas de broken UI: elements manquants, overflow visible, z-index incorrect, dead buttons/tabs
criteria.check: Visual inspection of all modified components

criteria.name: Design System
criteria.description: Couleurs, fonts, glass-morphic, emerald accent respectes. Pas de couleurs hardcodees hors palette.
criteria.check: grep for hardcoded colors not in palette

criteria.name: Responsive
criteria.description: Layout correct sur mobile (<768px), tablet (768-1024px), desktop (>1024px). Pas de horizontal scroll.

criteria.name: Animations
criteria.description: Framer Motion transitions fonctionnelles. Pas de flash, pas de jump, stagger correct.
